TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: Taimu go ś≥įś≠¶ťĄČ Taimu go mki sku Heto Keng. su'unun kwara glabang lingay 'kiyan ga 124.11 km¬≤ (rhyan rinpang glabang lingay 'kiyan ga 62.71 km¬≤, rr'an hyan glabang lingay 'kiyan ga 55.5 km¬≤), 5,057 hi ku su'unun kwara alang hi kya, 1,288 buwan ku kwarakya, tiku sahuy na alang Gyencumin ga 4,921 hi, kyala kwara pinspung s'uli ga 97%. kwara sahuy na alang Gyencumin ga Taywang Gyencumin na Paywan ku smrrhu ku pyux s'uli taya kya. ays ptyaw sebu Taimu go ays psgayun 6 ru 9 alang. 9 alang hani ga, Qapedang , Kaviyangan , Ulaljuc (ś≥įś≠¶ ťÉ®ŤźĹ), Masisi , Piyuma , Ludja , Tjaialev , Puljetji , Tjaranauma .
S.PHON: taimu …£o *** taimu …£o mki s~…ēku ńßeto keŇč. s~…ēu Ēunun kwara …£laő≤aŇč liŇčaj Ēkijan …£a ***.** km* (rńßjan rinpaŇč …£laő≤aŇč liŇčaj Ēkijan …£a **.** km*, rr Ēan ńßjan …£laő≤aŇč liŇčaj Ēkijan …£a **.* km*), *,*** ńßi ku s~…ēu Ēunun kwara alaŇč ńßi kja, *,*** ő≤uwan ku kwarakja, tiku s~…ēańßuj na alaŇč …£jen ¶~ ®umin …£a *,*** ńßi, kjala kwara pins~…ēpuŇč s~…ē Ēuli …£a **%. kwara s~…ēańßuj na alaŇč …£jen ¶~ ®umin …£a tajwaŇč …£jen ¶~ ®umin na pajwan ku s~…ēmrrńßu ku pjux s~…ē Ēuli taja kja. ajs~…ē ptjaw s~…ēeő≤u taimu …£o ajs~…ē ps~…ē…£ajun * ru * alaŇč. * alaŇč ńßani …£a, qape*aŇč , ka*ijaŇčan , ulalju ¶~ ® (** **), mas~…ēis~…ēi , pijuma , lu*ja , tjaiale* , puljetji , tjaranauma .
